description_long: This is a modern single-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a perimeter wall and featuring a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool and palm trees. The front of the house includes a driveway with a parked car and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The house has large windows, some of which face the pool area, allowing for ample natural light. The backyard is landscaped with greenery and a wooden deck adjacent to the pool, providing a relaxing outdoor space. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, complemented by wooden and glass accents. The property is bordered by trees and shrubs, enhancing privacy and curb appeal.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a perimeter wall and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and two large trees flanking the entry, with the pool and backyard visible behind the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the pool area, and the landscaped backyard with palm trees and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large swimming pool, wooden deck, and the back facade of the house with expansive windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway extension, perimeter wall, and additional landscaping along the side of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows facing the backyard
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved walkway, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and trees.
